{{Quote|I'd never seen so many stars, not even as a boy on Kallistas, lying on the roof of the threshing-house with insects humming in the summer dark.|Osvald Teshik remembers his childhood on Kallistas|<ref name="The Essential Guide to Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>}}
'''Kallistas''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony next to the [[Revkinn system/Legends|Revkinn system]] in the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]]. Its low mountains covered [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] elements and rare gemstones. Numerous [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] bases were located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]] spent part of his childhood, especially during the summers, on this [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
